headline: Moody's Credit Ratings Are Coming for Tokenized Assets. What This Means For Solana Might Surprise You.
summary: The credit ratings giant is making it even easier to invest in tokenized assets.

headline: SpaceX lands investment-grade credit ratings as shares tumble from record high
summary: SpaceX has been awarded investment-grade credit ratings by all three major agencies just days after its record stock market debut, even as its newly listed shares slid sharply on Thursday.View on euronews
